title: asclepias albens
intro: Asclepias albens, also known as White Milkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family, commonly found in the northwestern regions of North America. The plant contains cardioactive glycosides and other alkaloids, which have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, including treating respiratory issues and inflammation. The health benefits of Asclepias albens include its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, making it useful for alleviating coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional medicine for its antispasmodic and diuretic properties.
